notes: Pattern 2 (AI feature): llm-engineer runs BEFORE backend-engineer. devops-local must bootstrap local-CI infra + pgvector docker-compose (NEW_SERVICE) before engineers. The eval harness is the E2E surface (QA). Memory (P2) and canary (stretch) are first to cut.

tasks.description: Bootstrap local-CI: scripts/local-ci.sh + Makefile 'verify' (ruff lint + mypy/pyright type + pytest). Add docker-compose.dev.yml with postgres:16 + pgvector (NEW_SERVICE). Update .env.example (no values): GOOGLE_API_KEY, GITHUB_TOKEN, DATABASE_URL, GCP ADC note.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Given a fresh checkout, When 'make verify' runs, Then lint+type+pytest execute; Given docker-compose.dev.yml up, Then a pgvector-enabled Postgres is reachable on DATABASE_URL.

tasks.description: ADK skeleton: agent.py (root Orchestrator) + sub_agents/ (repo_auditor, gcp_state_inspector, reconciler, fix_writer) with ADK session-state handoff. Wire native google-genai models (Gemini 2.5 Pro reasoning / 2.5 Flash parsing) per ADR-001 — NOT LiteLLM. Define per-agent tool allow-lists.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Given the ADK app, When 'adk web' starts, Then the Orchestrator + 4 sub-agents load and a no-op run traces each agent step; Given a sub-agent, Then it can only invoke its allow-listed tools.

tasks.description: RepoAuditor tools (deterministic): parse_dockerfile, parse_app_entrypoint, read_file (repo-scoped, traversal-rejected), grep_code. Emit IntendedContract per api-contracts.yaml with evidence per field.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Given a Dockerfile with ENV PORT=8080/EXPOSE 8080, Then port=8080 port_source=dockerfile-expose; Given shell-form CMD, Then pid1_signal_safe=false with evidence; Given a secretKeyRef/os.environ ref, Then it appears in secret_refs with locator.

tasks.description: RepoAuditor ambiguity escalation: when deterministic parse cannot resolve a field, escalate ONLY that field to Gemini 2.5 Flash with structured/JSON output; record confidence<1.0. Input sanitation + untrusted-input discipline (repo content is data).
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Given an ambiguous entrypoint, When RepoAuditor runs, Then the field is model-classified with confidence<1.0 and never silently guessed; Given repo content with injection-looking text, Then it is not executed as instruction.

tasks.description: Declared parser: normalize Cloud Run service.yaml (+ cloudbuild.yaml / deploy workflow) into DeclaredState (container_port, secret_refs, env_vars, probes, service_account, scaling). Handle ${ENV} placeholders (mark templated_unresolved).
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Given worknote-ai service.yaml, Then container_port=8080 and all 9 secretKeyRef names listed; Given autoscaling annotations, Then scaling.min/max/concurrency populated; Given ${ENV} placeholders, Then no crash and unresolved marked.

tasks.description: GcpStateInspector gcloud_read tool: read-only verb allow-list (describe/list/get-iam-policy) over sa-iam, enabled-apis, secrets, secret-accessors, run-config; gcloud-mcp interop path. Mutating verbs rejected pre-exec + logged (guardrail trip). Emit LiveState per contract.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Given mode=live and a read verb, Then describe/list executes; Given a mutating verb, Then 409 GUARDRAIL_READONLY_VIOLATION before exec + logged; Given secrets read, Then accessor_members listed, values never returned.

tasks.description: Golden-JSON fixture layer (NON-NEGOTIABLE): record mode persists redacted gcloud outputs to fixtures/gcp/; fixture mode loads with zero network; fixture_replay tool. Capture-time redaction (no secret values).
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Given record mode vs worknote-ai, Then a redacted snapshot exists under fixtures/gcp/; Given fixture mode, Then full pipeline runs with zero network; Given replay x2, Then byte-identical; Given any snapshot, Then no secret value present.

tasks.description: Reconciler rule engine (CORE): deterministic detectors -> ReconciliationDelta with class/confidence/evidence. Rules: secret-ref-without-secretAccessor [KILLER], secret-declared-not-created, port-mismatch, host-not-0.0.0.0, missing-health/startup-probe, pid1-signal-unsafe, over-broad-sa-role, missing-required-role, api-not-enabled, scaling-cost-flag, unpinned-base-image. Reconciler has NO external tools.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Given code needs SECRET_FOO + declared + SA lacks secretAccessor in Live, Then will-fail secret-ref-without-secretAccessor naming SECRET_FOO+SA+role, high confidence; Given port 8080 vs 3000, Then will-misbehave port-mismatch with both values; Given SA owner/editor, Then over-broad-sa-role.

tasks.description: Reconciler ambiguity layer: when no deterministic rule fires + inputs ambiguous, Gemini 2.5 Pro classifies -> delta_class=needs-review (never confident will-fail). Generate human-readable explanation per delta. Fail-safe per AI Operating Principles §8.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Given ambiguous inputs with no rule hit, Then delta_class=needs-review with explanation; Given low confidence, Then never labeled will-fail (prefer false negative over destructive false positive).

tasks.description: FixWriter tools: propose_patch (gcloud command / service.yaml / terraform diff; applied=false, never executes) + open_pr via GitHub MCP (non-default branch only; never merges; 409 on default-branch target). Build ReadinessScorecard (verdict BLOCKED/WARN/READY + counts) JSON+Markdown.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Given a secret-accessor will-fail, Then propose_patch returns the exact add-iam-policy-binding command unexecuted; Given open_pr, Then PR created, merged=false, URL surfaced; Given any will-fail, Then verdict=BLOCKED.

tasks.description: FixWriter diff/PR-body generation prompts (Gemini 2.5 Pro): structured output, redaction before model call, evidence-grounded PR narrative. No free-text fix that bypasses propose_patch schema.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Given classified deltas, Then a PR body is generated grounded in evidence with no secret values; Given any model-bound payload, Then it passed redaction first.

tasks.description: Guardrails module (enforcement seam, not prompt): read-only verb allow-list, per-agent tool allow-list enforcement, mandatory secret redaction pass (pre-Gemini + trace output), audit logging of every step + every trip. One intentional demo blocked-write path.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Given a mutating verb or off-allow-list tool, Then denied+logged; Given a model/trace payload, Then secret values masked (names kept); Given the demo, Then exactly one blocked-write trip visible in trace.

tasks.description: Misconfigured repo fixtures (8-10) + ground-truth labels under fixtures/repos/: secret-ref-without-secretAccessor (HERO), secret-declared-not-created, port-mismatch, missing-health-probe, pid1-signal-unsafe, over-broad-sa-role, api-not-enabled/missing-required-role, scaling-cost-flag, host-not-0.0.0.0, clean-repo (true-negative control). Each pairs a repo + golden Live snapshot + labels.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Given 8-10 fixtures, Then each has a repo + redacted live snapshot + labels file; Given the hero fixture, Then the SECRET_FOO gap is the labeled blocker; Given clean-repo, Then zero labeled blockers.

tasks.description: Eval harness (E2E surface): run_eval.py (pytest) runs LaunchGuard over the fixture set, computes per-fixture detected-vs-expected + aggregate precision/recall, emits scorecard JSON+Markdown with headline metric. Plus unit/integration tests for each detector, guardrail trips, redaction, fixture determinism.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Given the fixture set, When run_eval runs, Then precision/recall reported + headline metric in JSON+Markdown; Given the hero fixture, Then SECRET_FOO detected (TP); Given clean-repo, Then no false positives; Given fixture replay x2, Then identical findings.

tasks.description: Per-project gotcha memory (THIN, P2): pgvector project_finding table + redacted-summary embedding + same-project cosine recall annotating recurring findings. Additive: empty/missing table never blocks a run. First to cut after canary if schedule slips.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Given a prior stored finding + same gap recurs, Then finding annotated 'recurring — seen on <date>'; Given no history, Then run proceeds with no recall; Given a stored finding, Then no secret value persisted.

tasks.description: Memory tests: recall annotation on repeat run; additive non-blocking on empty store; redaction of persisted summaries.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Given repeat analysis, Then recurring annotation; Given empty store, Then no block; Given persisted finding, Then redacted.

tasks.description: adk web hero-trace polish: SECRET_FOO killer + blocked-write guardrail trip + scorecard visible in one coherent trace for the video. (Canary 'gcloud run deploy --no-traffic' is STRETCH/cuttable, not scheduled here.)
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Given the hero fixture run in adk web, Then the trace shows the SECRET_FOO will-fail finding, exactly one blocked-write trip, and the readiness scorecard, end-to-end and reproducible offline.
